FROM (
    SELECT `u`.`Id`, `u`.`CreatedAt`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`EmailVerified`, `u`.`FirstName`, `u`.`IsBanned`, `u`.`LastLoginAt`, `u`.`LastName`, `u`.`PasswordHash`, `u`.`Status`, `u`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `Users` AS `u`
    WHERE `u`.`Id` = @__id_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `u1`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `u0`.`UserId`, `u0`.`RoleId`, `u0`.`AssignedAt`, `u0`.`AssignedBy`, `r`.`Id`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`Description`, `r`.`Name`
    FROM `UserRoles` AS `u0`
    INNER JOIN `Roles` AS `r` ON `u0`.`RoleId` = `r`.`Id`
) AS `s` ON `u1`.`Id` = `s`.`UserId`

SELECT `u`.`Id`, `u`.`CreatedAt`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`EmailVerified`, `u`.`FirstName`, `u`.`IsBanned`, `u`.`LastLoginAt`, `u`.`LastName`, `u`.`PasswordHash`, `u`.`Status`, `u`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`UserId`, `s`.`UserId`, `s`.`RoleId`, `s`.`AssignedAt`, `s`.`AssignedBy`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`CreatedAt`, `s`.`Description`, `s`.`Name`, `a`.`Bio`, `a`.`Course`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`GraduationYear`, `a`.`JobTitle`, `a`.`Location`, `a`.`ProfileImageUrl`, `a`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `Users` AS `u`
LEFT JOIN `AlumniProfiles` AS `a` ON `u`.`Id` = `a`.`UserId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `u0`.`UserId`, `u0`.`RoleId`, `u0`.`AssignedAt`, `u0`.`AssignedBy`, `r`.`Id`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`Description`, `r`.`Name`
    FROM `UserRoles` AS `u0`
    INNER JOIN `Roles` AS `r` ON `u0`.`RoleId` = `r`.`Id`
) AS `s` ON `u`.`Id` = `s`.`UserId`

SELECT `u`.`Id`, `u`.`CreatedAt`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`EmailVerified`, `u`.`FirstName`, `u`.`IsBanned`, `u`.`LastLoginAt`, `u`.`LastName`, `u`.`PasswordHash`, `u`.`Status`, `u`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`UserId`, `s`.`UserId`, `s`.`RoleId`, `s`.`AssignedAt`, `s`.`AssignedBy`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`CreatedAt`, `s`.`Description`, `s`.`Name`, `a`.`Bio`, `a`.`Course`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`GraduationYear`, `a`.`JobTitle`, `a`.`Location`, `a`.`ProfileImageUrl`, `a`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `Users` AS `u`
LEFT JOIN `AlumniProfiles` AS `a` ON `u`.`Id` = `a`.`UserId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `u0`.`UserId`, `u0`.`RoleId`, `u0`.`AssignedAt`, `u0`.`AssignedBy`, `r`.`Id`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`Description`, `r`.`Name`
    FROM `UserRoles` AS `u0`
    INNER JOIN `Roles` AS `r` ON `u0`.`RoleId` = `r`.`Id`
) AS `s` ON `u`.`Id` = `s`.`UserId`

SELECT `u`.`Id`, `u`.`CreatedAt`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`EmailVerified`, `u`.`FirstName`, `u`.`IsBanned`, `u`.`LastLoginAt`, `u`.`LastName`, `u`.`PasswordHash`, `u`.`Status`, `u`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`UserId`, `s`.`UserId`, `s`.`RoleId`, `s`.`AssignedAt`, `s`.`AssignedBy`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`CreatedAt`, `s`.`Description`, `s`.`Name`, `a`.`Bio`, `a`.`Course`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`GraduationYear`, `a`.`JobTitle`, `a`.`Location`, `a`.`ProfileImageUrl`, `a`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `Users` AS `u`
LEFT JOIN `AlumniProfiles` AS `a` ON `u`.`Id` = `a`.`UserId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `u0`.`UserId`, `u0`.`RoleId`, `u0`.`AssignedAt`, `u0`.`AssignedBy`, `r`.`Id`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`Description`, `r`.`Name`
    FROM `UserRoles` AS `u0`
    INNER JOIN `Roles` AS `r` ON `u0`.`RoleId` = `r`.`Id`
) AS `s` ON `u`.`Id` = `s`.`UserId`

SELECT `u`.`Id`, `u`.`CreatedAt`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`EmailVerified`, `u`.`FirstName`, `u`.`IsBanned`, `u`.`LastLoginAt`, `u`.`LastName`, `u`.`PasswordHash`, `u`.`Status`, `u`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`UserId`, `s`.`UserId`, `s`.`RoleId`, `s`.`AssignedAt`, `s`.`AssignedBy`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`CreatedAt`, `s`.`Description`, `s`.`Name`, `a`.`Bio`, `a`.`Course`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`GraduationYear`, `a`.`JobTitle`, `a`.`Location`, `a`.`ProfileImageUrl`, `a`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `Users` AS `u`
LEFT JOIN `AlumniProfiles` AS `a` ON `u`.`Id` = `a`.`UserId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `u0`.`UserId`, `u0`.`RoleId`, `u0`.`AssignedAt`, `u0`.`AssignedBy`, `r`.`Id`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`Description`, `r`.`Name`
    FROM `UserRoles` AS `u0`
    INNER JOIN `Roles` AS `r` ON `u0`.`RoleId` = `r`.`Id`
) AS `s` ON `u`.`Id` = `s`.`UserId`
ORDER BY `u`.`CreatedAt`, `u`.`Id`, `a`.`UserId`, `s`.`UserId`, `s`.`RoleId` {"EventId":{"Id":20100,"Name":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command.CommandExecuting"},"SourceContext":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command","ActionId":"3b4af3b2-9504-4032-b469-49aca50e0c5e","ActionName":"IHCAE.Api.Controllers.UserManagementController.GetAllUsers (IHCAE.Api)","RequestId":"0HNG7VAOLF8IB:00000002","RequestPath":"/api/v1/usermanagement/all","ConnectionId":"0HNG7VAOLF8IB"}

    SELECT `u`.`Id`, `u`.`CreatedAt`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`EmailVerified`, `u`.`FirstName`, `u`.`IsBanned`, `u`.`LastLoginAt`, `u`.`LastName`, `u`.`PasswordHash`, `u`.`Status`, `u`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`UserId`, `a`.`Bio`, `a`.`Course`, `a`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `a`.`GraduationYear`, `a`.`JobTitle`, `a`.`Location`, `a`.`ProfileImageUrl`, `a`.`UpdatedAt` AS `UpdatedAt0`
    FROM `Users` AS `u`
    LEFT JOIN `AlumniProfiles` AS `a` ON `u`.`Id` = `a`.`UserId`
    WHERE LOWER(`u`.`Email`) = @__ToLower_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `s`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `u0`.`UserId`, `u0`.`RoleId`, `u0`.`AssignedAt`, `u0`.`AssignedBy`, `r`.`Id`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`Description`, `r`.`Name`
    FROM `UserRoles` AS `u0`
    INNER JOIN `Roles` AS `r` ON `u0`.`RoleId` = `r`.`Id`
) AS `s0` ON `s`.`Id` = `s0`.`UserId`

[2025-10-11 08:20:07.459 +05:30 DBG] Executing DbCommand [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT `u`.`Id`, `u`.`CreatedAt`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`EmailVerified`, `u`.`FirstName`, `u`.`IsBanned`, `u`.`LastLoginAt`, `u`.`LastName`, `u`.`PasswordHash`, `u`.`Status`, `u`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`UserId`, `s`.`UserId`, `s`.`RoleId`, `s`.`AssignedAt`, `s`.`AssignedBy`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`CreatedAt`, `s`.`Description`, `s`.`Name`, `a`.`Bio`, `a`.`Course`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`GraduationYear`, `a`.`JobTitle`, `a`.`Location`, `a`.`ProfileImageUrl`, `a`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `Users` AS `u`
LEFT JOIN `AlumniProfiles` AS `a` ON `u`.`Id` = `a`.`UserId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `u0`.`UserId`, `u0`.`RoleId`, `u0`.`AssignedAt`, `u0`.`AssignedBy`, `r`.`Id`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`Description`, `r`.`Name`
    FROM `UserRoles` AS `u0`
    INNER JOIN `Roles` AS `r` ON `u0`.`RoleId` = `r`.`Id`
) AS `s` ON `u`.`Id` = `s`.`UserId`
